examples.text: Africa is particularly vulnerable, in part because it is already struggling to feed itself and it will have to vastly increase yields and productivity if it is to put food on the plates of a fast-growing population, even without climate change.
examples.explanation: 非洲尤为脆弱，部分原因在于其已难以自给粮食，若要在不依赖气候变化的情况下满足快速增长人口的饮食需求，必须大幅提高产量和生产效率。

reviewSessions.example_text: Africa is particularly vulnerable, in part because it is already struggling to feed itself and it will have to vastly increase yields and productivity if it is to put food on the plates of a fast-growing population, even without climate change.
reviewSessions.feedback: 答案与词条常见义有关，但不符合本句中“vastly”的意思；此处应为“大幅地、极大地”。
matched_points: 知道 vast 常见义可表示“巨大的/广阔的”相关概念
missing_points: 未识别本句考查的是副词 vastly
未答出“极大地/大幅地”这一义项
未结合例句中 increase 的程度意义理解
